title: Cyrtochilum trilingue
taxonomy: Cyrtochilum trilingue is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is a part of the genus Cyrtochilum. Cyrtochilum trilingue is native to Central America, specifically in the tropical regions of Costa Rica and Panama. The classification of Cyrtochilum trilingue also includes its order, Asparagales, and the subclass, Liliidae. Cyrtochilum trilingue is further classified under the subfamily Orchidoideae.
